parsed.deploy_yml:
name: Deploy MCP Servers (LLM-Assisted)
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - llm-assisted
  workflow_dispatch:
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Write SSH key to file
        run: echo "$EC2_SSH_KEY" > ssh_key.pem && chmod 600 ssh_key.pem
      - name: Record deployment start time
        run: echo "::set-output name=start_time::$(date +%s)"
      - name: SCP MCP-Jira Docker directory
        run: scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ssh_key.pem -r llm-assisted/docker/jira ubuntu@$EC2_HOST:/home/ubuntu/jira
      - name: SCP MCP-GitHub Docker directory
        run: scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ssh_key.pem -r llm-assisted/docker/github ubuntu@$EC2_HOST:/home/ubuntu/github
      - name: Build and deploy MCP-Jira
        run: |
          ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ssh_key.pem ubuntu@$EC2_HOST << 'EOF'
          set -e
          cd /home/ubuntu/jira
          docker build -t mcp-jira .
          docker stop mcp-jira || true
          docker rm mcp-jira || true
          docker run -d -p 80:8000 --restart unless-stopped --name mcp-jira mcp-jira
          EOF
      - name: Build and deploy MCP-GitHub
        run: |
          ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ssh_key.pem ubuntu@$EC2_HOST << 'EOF'
          set -e
          cd /home/ubuntu/github
          docker build -t mcp-github .
          docker stop mcp-github || true
          docker rm mcp-github || true
          docker run -d -p 81:8000 --restart unless-stopped --name mcp-github mcp-github
          EOF
      - name: Health check for MCP-Jira
        run: |
          n=1
          until [ $n -ge 13 ] || [ $(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://$EC2_HOST:80/health) -eq 200 ]; do
            sleep 5
            n=$((n+1))
          done
          [ $n -lt 13 ]
      - name: Health check for MCP-GitHub
        run: |
          n=1
          until [ $n -ge 13 ] || [ $(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://$EC2_HOST:81/health) -eq 200 ]; do
            sleep 5
            n=$((n+1))
          done
          [ $n -lt 13 ]
      - name: Functional test for MCP-Jira
        run: |
          response=$(curl -s http://$EC2_HOST:80/create_ticket?project=TEST&summary=CI-test&priority=Medium)
          echo $response | grep -q '"status":"success"'
      - name: Functional test for MCP-GitHub
        run: |
          response=$(curl -s http://$EC2_HOST:81/create_issue?owner=test&repo=test-repo&title=CI-test)
          echo $response | grep -q '"status":"success"'
      - name: Print deployment summary
        run: |
          end_time=$(date +%s)
          duration=$((end_time - ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.start_time }}))
          echo "Deployment took $duration seconds"
      - name: Clean up
        run: rm ssh_key.pem
      - name: Finalize
        run: exit 0
